rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RICHARD CHASE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for Sanctions is denied. Although the petition for reconsideration was not supported by new or different facts within the meaning of CCP section 1008, the Court concludes that it was not presented for an improper purpose of delay or harassment (CCP section 128.7(b)(1)), and, while the Court is concerned about the effect on its docket of unnecessary and unsupported motions for reconsideration, the Court concludes that sanctions are not necessary or appropriate to deter repetition of the conduct (section 128.7(d)) given all the circumstances of this particular case. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing for the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Tuesday, October 13, 2015.
